faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Passaic range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes common in Passaic homes?
faqs.answer: Passaic's older housing stock, humid climate near the Passaic River, and abundance of moisture in basements and crawl spaces create perfect conditions for centipedes. These pests are attracted to damp environments and often enter through cracks in foundations, which are common in the city's historic buildings.
